name: Case PhishHook: Identity Theft Ring
description: Investigation into a bulk phishing syndicate. The ring coordinates the distribution of malicious links spoofing major banks to harvest credentials and coordinates SIM-swap operations.

anomalies.description: Sent bulk SMS templates containing domain lookalikes of Chase and Bank of America.
anomalies.evidence: Ryan: 'Send out the link: http://chase-login-verify-security.com now.'
anomalies.recommendation: Request domain takedown. Correlate with bulk spam sender server records.

anomalies.description: Instruction sent to swap IMSI code of victim's phone immediately before high-value withdrawals.
anomalies.evidence: Kelly: 'Swap complete. BofA verification SMS should route to our burner now.'
anomalies.recommendation: Identify specific carrier logs for target IMSI change on May 16.

timeline.content: Spin up the login page clone. Make sure the database is logging passwords.
Send out the link: http://chase-login-verify-security.com now to list group 3.
Got target's details. Preparing SIM swap for Senator's account.
Swap complete. BofA verification SMS should route to our burner now. Log in and withdraw.
Browser status: Connected to bank portal, OTP received and accepted.

presets.query: Identify phishing links or fake domains sent to victims.
presets.translation: SELECT url, sender FROM message_logs WHERE message LIKE '%http%' AND (message LIKE '%login%' OR message LIKE '%security%' OR message LIKE '%verify%')
presets.summary: The AI highlighted a domain template sent by Ryan Cross to Bulk Sender #5 on May 16: **'http://chase-login-verify-security.com'**, which matches lookalike patterns of financial institutions commonly used for phishing.

results.message: Send out the link: http://chase-login-verify-security.com now to list group 3.

suggestions: Check SIM swap logs on carrier systems for listed targets.
Find other IP hits on the phishing clone web server.

presets.query: Identify SIM swap instructions and carrier insider activity.
presets.translation: SELECT * FROM chat_logs WHERE message LIKE '%swap%' OR message LIKE '%IMSI%' OR message LIKE '%sim%'
presets.summary: SIM swap execution confirmed. Kelly Chen (SimSwap_Pro) messaged Ryan Cross on May 16 at 1:45 PM: **'Swap complete. BofA verification SMS should route to our burner now. Log in and withdraw.'**

results.message: Swap complete. BofA verification SMS should route to our burner now. Log in and withdraw.

suggestions: Check carrier employee login history for Kelly Chen.
Track IP address associated with BofA transaction.

presets.query: Trace Ryan Cross's browser activity and banking portal logins.
presets.intent: Audit suspect device web navigation logs
presets.translation: SELECT timestamp, actor, content FROM web_browser_logs WHERE actor = 'Ryan Cross' OR content LIKE '%bank%'
presets.summary: Illicit financial access logged. Browser activity shows Ryan Cross connected to the victim's banking portal at 1:48 PM, utilizing the diverted OTP.

results.message: Browser status: Connected to bank portal, OTP received and accepted.

suggestions: Extract session cookies from browser SQLite databases.
Trace routing IPs through Tor nodes or VPN gateways.
